name: A2B Transportation
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (not directly verified); local directory listing only
notes: No USDOT match for the East Orange, NJ A2B Transportation at 25 Evergreen Pl (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER keyword search 'A2B TRANSPORTATION' returns 15 carriers nationally; none located in NJ. Note that A2B Transportation Inc (a2btransportation.org / a2bconnect.org) is a separate luxury-coach operator headquartered at 455 Plaza Dr, Secaucus, NJ — different address; not the same operator. The East Orange entry appears to be a small van/sedan operator listed on Nextdoor/directories but with no FMCSA registration and no readily discoverable NJ corp record.

name: Four Winds Bus Fleet Inc
notes: FMCSA SAFER returns no AL match for 'FOUR WINDS BUS' or 'FOUR WINDS' in Birmingham (only one OR-based 'FOUR WINDS' carrier). Legal name was almost certainly 'Four Winds, Inc.' (per fourwindsinc.net) operating school-bus service in Birmingham, AL for 40+ years; company self-reports it 'permanently closed due to COVID-19' and referred clients to Pacer Enterprises Inc. Likely intrastate-only while it operated. No USDOT recorded (likely intrastate). Address from source: 1700 28th W, Birmingham, AL 35218.

name: Vickie A Cubbage Inc
entity_status: active (per siccode/manta/bizapedia listings; MD SDAT not directly verified)
registry_source: SICCODE / Manta / Bizapedia (MD SDAT Business Express search recommended for definitive record)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate Maryland school-bus contractor). FMCSA SAFER returned no records for 'VICKIE CUBBAGE' or 'CUBBAGE'. SICCODE classifies as SIC 4151 / NAICS 485410 (School and Employee Bus Transportation) at Sykesville, MD 21784. Bizapedia indexes the legal entity as 'VICKIE A. CUBBAGE, INC.' with a Woodbine, MD principal address (Vickie A Cubbage owns property at 7229 Woodbine Rd, Woodbine MD 21797 per Carroll County tax records); the 7400 Locust Ln, Sykesville MD address on file is the operating address. Small-revenue school-bus contractor.

Classified Transportation / All Other Transit & Ground Passenger Transportation.
